steps.name: log Positive test scenario
Before@positive
log Initialized API client
Before@api
log API base URL set to: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com
Given the API base URL is "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com"
log Content-Type header set to: application/json
And the request content type is "application/json"
log GET https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1

request ("{ method: 'GET', url: 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/pos'... 4 more characters, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Accept: 'application/json' }, qs: {}, failOnStatusCode: false }")
log API: GET https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1
log Status: 200 (28ms)

log Response Body: {"userId":1,"id":1,"title":"sunt aut facere repellat provident occaecati excepturi optio reprehenderit","body":"quia et suscipit
suscipit recusandae consequuntur expedita et cum
reprehenderit molestiae ut ut quas totam
nostrum rerum est autem sunt rem eveniet architecto"}
wrap Object{8}
When I send a GET request to "/posts/1"
Then the response headers should contain "Content-Type"
assertexpected { Object (body, headers, ...) } not to be null
